title: 3 Pack Aonomi Rhino a18444 Labels Replace for DYMO Rhino 18444 1/2" 12mm Permanent Polyester Vinyl Industrial Tape Work with Rhino 5200 4200 6000 6000+ Industrial Label Maker, Black on White
features: Compatible industrial permanent vinyl labels Equivalent to the replacement forDYMO 18444; Label Size - text: 1/2" (12mm) x 18' (5.5m). Color(s): Black on White. Split-back make it easy to peel
Compatible with DYMO Rhino 1000, 3000, 4200, 5000, 5200, 6000, ILP-219, 3M PL100, PL200, PL300 and Tyco T107M Label Makers
Offers damp, Corrosion-Proof and sunlight proof. It is suitable for indoor or outdoor use. Available in the widest range of colors that adhere to OSHA, ANSI and ISO color standards

Colored vinyl tape features strong adhesives that stuck to difficult surfaces which withstands demanding professional conditions and last in heavy-duty environments, attached to curved, flat and highly textured surfaces
Provides exactly the kind of durability and versatility that professional and industrial organizations require. They will stay attached and readable without falling off
description: Product Description Coloured Vinyl tape combines flexibility, a strong adhesive and a high chemical resistance which makes this tape suitable for many type of applications where colour is requested. Ideal for cable and wiring applications. Choose Right Labels to Right Applications: (To meet many applications, our replacement labels come in a variety of materials) Vinyl Labels: For Flat or curved surfaces; can be used indoors and outdoors. Aonomi replacement DYMO 18444 Rhino Vinyl Label Tapes Durable, long-lasting, tear-proof, high industrial-strength adhesive label cartridges Specification: Type: Non-OEM Adhesive: Permanent Label Color: White Printed Text Color: Black Size of Each Cartridge: Width: 1/2" (12mm) Length: 18' (5.5m) What's in the Box: 3 x Replacement DYMO 18444 Black on White Label Maker Tapes Features: • Durable, smear-proof and resistant to chemicals, solvents, heat, UV, and more. • Split back design making it easy to peel and apply. • No sticky residue remains when the labels are removed. • Black print against the white backdrop is bold and easy to read. • Tear-proof material resists damage when pulled through tight spaces or conduits. • Withstands temperatures from -18 to 120 degrees Celsius. • High quality Permanent adhesive results in labels that stick - last even in heavy-duty environments. • Available in the widest range of colors that adhere to OSHA, ANSI and ISO color standards. • Industrial vinyl label is formulated with a permanent acrylic adhesive, ideal to be used for any flat/curved or textured surface. • Offering moisture, scratch, chemical, oil and UV resistance, recommended for labeling both indoors and outdoors. Black print against the white backdrop is bold and easy to read. Durable, smear-proof and resistant to chemicals, solvents, heat, UV, and more. Offering moisture, scratch, chemical, oil and UV resistance, for both indoor and outdoor use.
